svg.text: Competitive AI Liquidity Management on Uniswap
Universal Router - receives API-generated swap calldata
collect() - realize fees | slot0() - position valuation
AM: intents, values, reg, pause, close
Sandboxed AI strategies | TEE-ready for production
Fee Waterfall (per epoch, from collected Uniswap fees)
Vault reconciles: totalAssets = positionValue + idle + depositorReturn
